description: Wikipedia article summary for Albert Einstein (example person lookup)

query.description: The topic to search for on Wikipedia

response.title: Albert Einstein
response.extract: Albert Einstein (14 March 1879 – 18 April 1955) was a German-born theoretical physicist who is widely held to be one of the greatest and most influential scientists of all time. Best known for developing the theory of relativity, Einstein also made important contributions to quantum mechanics. He emigrated from Germany to the United States in 1933 and became a U.S. citizen in 1940.
